prompt: My Flutter app has a build error: 'gradle: version 7.2.0 is not supported'. I have no idea what this means. Should I just update gradle in the Gradle wrapper?
expected_output: No — that's a symptom, not the fix. The error means your Flutter SDK expects gradle version X but your android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties has version 7.2.0. Options: (1) Update compileSdkVersion in android/app/build.gradle to match your Gradle version, or (2) Update gradle wrapper to a version compatible with your compileSdkVersion. Check the Common Failures table for 'Build fails with Gradle error' — it shows the proper fix. Don't just increment versions randomly. Always check the error output for the recommended version.
